text:
ああ、戻ったか。
それなりの数を駆逐してきたようだね。

群れをなしての自爆攻撃も
あんたの手にかかれば
脅威でもなんでもないね。

どんな攻撃をしてくるダーカーであれ
やられる前にやるだけだ。
ヤツらに慈悲の心などいらない。

どうせまた、すぐにわいてくるだろう。
その時は、よろし

Ah, so you're back.
Looks like you exterminated quite a few.

Guess they were no threat to you even with
their swarming and self-destructing ways.

No matter what attacks Falspawn throw at
you, you just have to kill them before they
kill you. They don't deserve mercy.

I'm sure they'll be springing up again
before long. I'm counting on you when
the time comes.
